metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace by Charalampos Kyfonidis

plugins.name: agent-step-toolkit
plugins.description: Build agent-step LangGraph projects and tools: bootstrap a new project (runner library + streaming CLI + scaffold), add domain tools (actions / executors / verifiers / controller hooks + invalidatesOnChange), version the embedded runner library (/bump-version + /pull-library), and lay down the three-layer test methodology.
